prompt: A luxurious tourism poster for Malaysia, designed as a vertical fine-art travel advertisement on a clean ivory-white textured background with subtle embossed ornamental patterns. The composition is built around one long flowing red-and-gold batik silk ribbon that sweeps diagonally and spirals through the page, forming an elegant S-curve and visually containing a dreamlike collage of landmarks, culture, and nature. At the top left, warm golden sunrise light pours over misty tropical mountains and rainforest with a waterfall, dense palms, and a large rhinoceros hornbill perched beside hibiscus flowers and white tropical blossoms. In the upper center, a detailed Kuala Lumpur skyline rises from mist, dominated by the Petronas Twin Towers, with the KL Tower and several modern skyscrapers visible. Near the upper right floats 1 colorful traditional wau kite with floral patterns against open white space. In the middle left, include 1 grand mosque with multiple domes and minarets set among palms and haze. In the middle center-right, include the historic Sultan Abdul Samad Building with its copper domes and clocktower. In the lower middle left, include 1 elevated red-and-silver urban train crossing through the city. In the lower center, show 1 ornate Chinatown gate labeled Jalan Petaling, decorated with red lanterns and bustling pedestrians. In the lower right-middle, depict the Batu Caves area with 1 towering golden Murugan statue and 1 steep rainbow staircase climbing into limestone cliffs, surrounded by crowds. At the lower right, nestle 1 landscaped city park with a turquoise lake and fountains. Purple orchids and tropical flowers are woven into the ribbon and foreground in several places. At the very bottom right, show 1 small traditional dancer in red and gold attire twirling the trailing end of the ribbon. The collage should feel luminous, hyper-detailed, majestic, and celebratory, blending photorealistic architecture with painterly fantasy travel-poster styling, soft clouds, atmospheric haze, and glowing highlights. Add elegant poster typography in the lower left: the main headline reads VISIT MALAYSIA 2026, a smaller location line reads KUALA LUMPUR, a blue script tourism slogan reads Malaysia Truly Asia, and below that a small refined subheading reads Where Diversity Converges\nKuala Lumpur, City of Wonders\nThe Heart of Asia. Use a premium color palette of gold, crimson, ivory, emerald, sky blue, and tropical greens, with polished editorial composition and high-end destination-branding aesthetics.
